What You're Getting

Why Ceramic
Coating?

It's not just a wax — it's a permanent layer of molecular armour that bonds to your paintwork.

Ceramic coating is a liquid polymer that chemically bonds to your car's factory paint, forming a durable protective layer. Unlike wax or sealants, it doesn't wash away — it becomes part of the surface.

Once applied at our detailing studio, your car gains a hard, hydrophobic shell that makes cleaning effortless and keeps the gloss deep and rich for years.

  • Hydrophobic — water beads and slides straight off
  • UV and oxidation protection — no more faded paint
  • Chemical and contaminant resistance
  • Deep, glossy finish that lasts years — not weeks
  • Much easier to keep clean day-to-day
